title: SSC CHSL 2026 Apply Online – 4000+ Vacancy, Eligibility, Last Date
description: SSC CHSL 2026 notification for LDC, JSA, DEO posts. Check eligibility, age limit, syllabus, exam date and apply online details.
keywords: SSC CHSL 2026, SSC CHSL apply online, SSC 12th pass job 2026, LDC vacancy 2026, SSC CHSL last date, SSC CHSL syllabus, SSC CHSL exam date
introduction: अगर आप 12वीं पास हैं और केंद्र सरकार में नौकरी पाने का सपना देख रहे हैं, तो Staff Selection Commission (SSC) द्वारा आयोजित SSC CHSL 2026 भर्ती आपके लिए एक बेहतरीन अवसर साबित हो सकती है। SSC Combined Higher Secondary Level (CHSL) परीक्षा भारत की सबसे लोकप्रिय सरकारी परीक्षाओं में से एक है, जिसके माध्यम से उम्मीदवारों को Lower Division Clerk (LDC), Junior Secretariat Assistant (JSA), Postal Assistant (PA), Sorting Assistant (SA) और Data Entry Operator (DEO) जैसे पदों पर नियुक्ति दी जाती है। SSC CHSL 2026 Notification का इंतजार कर रहे उम्मीदवारों के लिए बड़ी खबर यह है कि आयोग जल्द ही आधिकारिक नोटिफिकेशन जारी करने वाला है, जिसके बाद SSC CHSL 2026 Online Form शुरू हो जाएगा।
recruitment-body: Staff Selection Commission (SSC) har saal Combined Higher Secondary Level (CHSL) exam conduct karta hai. Is exam ke through LDC, JSA aur DEO jaise posts par recruitment hota hai. Is saal approx 4000+ vacancies expected hain.
qualification: Candidates must have passed 12th (Intermediate) from any recognized board in India.
age-relation: Age relaxation applicable as per rules
eligibility-one: 12th pass candidates eligible. LDC/JSA ke liye typing skill required hai aur DEO ke liye data entry speed honi chahiye.
eligibility-two: Candidates must have passed 12th (Intermediate) from any recognized board in India.
eligibility-three: Candidates must be physically and mentally fit.
subject-1-topics: Analogy, Coding-Decoding, Series, Blood Relation, Puzzle
subject-2-topics: Current Affairs, History, Geography, Polity, Science
subject-3-topics: Simplification, Percentage, Profit & Loss, Time & Work, SI & CI
subject-10-topics: Full Length Test, Previous Year Questions
faq-one-para: SSC CHSL 2026 Notification expected to be released in June 2026.
faq-two-para: SSC CHSL 2026 Notification expected to be released in June 2026.
